prompt: 我在一个有 3 个 git 子模块的项目中工作 (aria, standards, aria-orchestrator)。最近其他协作者推送了 submodule 更新到远程。我想运行状态扫描了解当前本地代码是否和远程同步，特别是子模块是否落后远程。请扫描并告诉我是否需要 git submodule update。

assertions.text: Output lists each submodule with tree_commit / head_commit / remote_commit fields
Checks submodule drift via tree_vs_remote comparison
Recommends git submodule update --remote when drift detected (submodule_drift rule)
Does NOT execute git fetch without user consent (reads FETCH_HEAD age instead)
Gracefully handles missing origin/HEAD via four-tier fallback
Fail-soft on git errors, does not abort the whole scan
Output contains a dedicated 🔄 同步状态 section (or equivalent)
